channel.title: David Tepper — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED NVDA (+25%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added NVDA in Q4 2025 · 10.2% of portfolio. Doubling down on AI infrastructure.

item.title: David Tepper: NEW POSITION UBER · Q4 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) new position UBER in Q4 2025 · 4.1% of portfolio. New Uber position — AV optionality thesis.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED BABA (+30%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added BABA in Q4 2025 · 5.4% of portfolio. Adding to China contrarian bet.

item.title: David Tepper: TRIMMED META (-8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) trimmed META in Q4 2025 · 9.1% of portfolio. Small META profit-take.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED NVDA (+35%) · Q3 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added NVDA in Q3 2025 · 8.4% of portfolio. Big NVDA add.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED META (+22%) · Q3 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added META in Q3 2025 · 9.8% of portfolio. Building META conviction.

item.title: David Tepper: NEW POSITION BABA · Q3 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) new position BABA in Q3 2025 · 4.2% of portfolio. New Alibaba position — China contrarian.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED NVDA (+30%) · Q4 2024
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added NVDA in Q4 2024 · 8.6% of portfolio. Loaded up on NVDA.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED META (+25%) · Q4 2024
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added META in Q4 2024 · 9.0% of portfolio. Building META conviction.

item.title: David Tepper: NEW POSITION BABA · Q4 2024
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) new position BABA in Q4 2024 · 3.4% of portfolio. First BABA position.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED NVDA (+25%) · Q3 2024
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added NVDA in Q3 2024 · 7.0% of portfolio. NVDA buildup.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED META (+18%) · Q3 2024
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added META in Q3 2024 · 7.5% of portfolio. Building META.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED NVDA (+18%) · Q2 2024
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added NVDA in Q2 2024 · 5.8% of portfolio. NVDA build.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED META (+14%) · Q2 2024
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added META in Q2 2024 · 6.5% of portfolio. META add.

item.title: David Tepper: NEW POSITION NVDA · Q1 2024
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) new position NVDA in Q1 2024 · 5.0% of portfolio. Tepper's first NVDA position.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED META (+8%) · Q1 2024
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added META in Q1 2024 · 5.5% of portfolio. META add.
